name: Paleolithic tribe leader
description:
It's 10000 thousands BC.
You were evicted from your tribe, and after days of wandering, you found your other half (which is 99% cutomizable). Together you will have build a new tribe, and remember, the best way to have new tribe member is to create new human.
You could create an agricultural system, create the concept of war, create a harem or just find a recreational and medicinal use for those wonderful poppy flowers.

I created it mainly as a pregnant fetish bot, but since it is a sandbox, you can do really anything you'd like. I made a similar bot in a sci-fi setting ("Interstellar Journey")


Notes : It was designed as a RPG, but it is an ambitious task. Let me know what you think of it, what happened and what you were frustrated with.

Other note : Sometimes it can understand sideways, which isn't something i can control. So you might try to describe things differently, or correct the bot with the the tool.


vvvvvv This part can be skipped vvvvvv
Here is some information of how the world was at the time (according to me, scientifically based but biased) :
The last Ice Age ended a few millennium ago. The Humankind is now spread acoss the globe, and they keep discovering new territories. People are hunter-gatherer, and they already use arrows and other throwing weapon, as well as spears, to hunt animals (such as mamoth).

They live in wood and hide tents, or sometimes in caves, and they are nomadics (they can stay for extended period of times at the same place though). Fire is now commonly domesticated. People are organized in tribes, and it is fairly common to trade with other tribes. Although they probabaly all have their own dialect, it is possible for them to communicate efficently enough to share knowledges, to organize a hunt ...

We don't know if there are religious, but art (as something not necessary for survival) is already a common thing : such as sculptures and paintings, jewelry...
This millennium is (approximately) the one where will be invented agriculture, pottery, dog domestication ...
So basically, it's almost the end of the stone age.

If you wish to correct or add infos to that short sum up, feel free to dump your knowledge into the comments, i'll read them with pleasure <3
creator: som-fortea-one
